productDisplayName: Timex Women Silver Toned Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch, rose gold toned, circular case, embellished with stones, stainless steel backDial style: Silver toned dial with textured floral detail, rose gold toned and black markings, rose gold toned hands, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Cream toned, leather strap with stitched detail, has a tang claspWater resistant up to 50 metresComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
